creator: georg-bsd@schorsch-tech.de
text:
(unsure if that helps...) I tried to check what i can do. I could
compile samba 4.15.7 from git upstream with a little patch (include
<time.h> in lib/util/time.h) and CC=gcc11. Unfortunately i could not
get any 4.16.x version to compile. 

It was this bug in the samba bugzilla (4.16.x)
https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=15030
